ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "molid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "iupac" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the compound */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the compound */,
  "chembl_id" INTEGER /* ChEMBL identifier for drug discovery */,
  "clinical_phase" INTEGER /* Clinical phase of the compound development */,
  "atoms" INTEGER /* Number of atoms in the compound */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the compound */,
  "curation" TEXT /* Curation status of the data */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility setting of the compound data */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* International Chemical Identifier (InChI) of the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System (SMILES) representation of the compound */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the compound */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility information of the compound */,
  "melting_point" TEXT /* Melting point of the compound */,
  "boiling_point" TEXT /* Boiling point of the compound */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was first added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the compound's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_visibility FOREIGN KEY ("visibility") REFERENCES visibility_settings ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_clinical_phase FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_phase") REFERENCES clinical_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_curation FOREIGN KEY ("curation") REFERENCES curation_status ("curation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_charge FOREIGN KEY ("charge") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical phase (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clinical phase (e.g., Active, Completed, Terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., chemist, researcher, technician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curation_status" (
  "curation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the curation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the curation status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the curation status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_settings" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility setting */,
  "visibility_name" TEXT /* Name of the visibility setting (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visibility setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visibility setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the visibility setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_value" INTEGER /* Value of the charge (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the charge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the charge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "molid" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the compound */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "client_info" TEXT /* Additional client information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_logs_molid FOREIGN KEY ("molid") REFERENCES compounds ("molid")
)
